ab: ’una ku tacini kana’ua sarunai, Pori kisʉʉn. cenana isi maan cani cenana sua nguain.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫Pori。他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is Pori, he is 11 years old.

ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: iku mataa kana’ua sarunai manmaan kim paracani.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: manmaan ku makananguru, noo tarasangara taniara, cani pininga kim arakukunu arapiningi makananguru.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: manmaan ku tarakanangʉ vo’orua tangria, tʉni kim arakukunu paracani mataa makananguru.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
